title: Tinkers' Ponder
description: Ponder as a Tinker! Create custom Ponder scenes with TConstruct.
body:
# 🛠️ Tinkers' Ponder – Tinkers' Construct × Ponder
A **Ponder extension** built exclusively for **Tinkers' Construct**, letting you easily create **custom Ponder scenes** deeply integrated with Tinkers' mechanics.Turn complex processes like **casting and smelting** into intuitive, step-by-step animations anyone can follow.  
A for **mod developers** and **map authors**, making your Tinkers’ content more engaging and educational.  
## Required mod
- Tinkers' Construct
- _(Built-in Ponder, not require the Create after v1.1 and there is no conflict)_
## Scene List
- `alloyer_building`
- `casting`
- `foundry_building`
- `heater_using`
- `melter_building`
- `melter_using`
- `sand_casting`
- `smeltery_building`
- `smeltery_mini`
- `smeltery_using`
- `tank`
## 
如果你是中文用户可以选择访问[MCMOD](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/24954.html)。
